reason: `forge webtrigger list` has no --json (or structured-output) flag.
verified_via: ctx7 /websites/developer_atlassian_platform_forge cli-reference/webtrigger-list (options: function key, site, product, environment only)
current_workaround: getWebtriggerUrl() in scripts/lib/forge.mjs scrapes the first https URL out of the box-drawing TABLE output. Marked EXPERIMENTAL.
candidate_resolution: Adopt `forge webtrigger list --json` when Forge CLI exposes it, then replace the table scrape with a JSON parse.
note: forge install list --json IS supported and is now used (see evidence/nih/forge-json.json).
